g.title: cluster_stash
g.text: Stash Attribution (separate, NOT a rewrite op)

g.title: cluster_v3
g.text: handle_rewrite_op_v3() — SINGLE FUNCTION FOR ALL REWRITES

g.title: perf
g.text: 2. git notes show (1 per original with note)
3. git cat-file (1 per file per modified pair)
4. git notes add (1 per new commit)
No reflog parsing. No ancestry validation.
No blame fallback. No rewrite_log I/O.

g.title: inv2
g.text: Diff against ALL originals, UNION attrs.
No attribution loss from non-matched originals.

g.title: inv3
g.text: Not handled here. Normal post-commit flow.
AI agent checkpoints → post_commit() as usual.
